top_findings.summary: The skill describes automated scraping of personal data from free people search websites (FastPeopleSearch.com, TruePeopleSearch.com) using Manus automation, which likely violates those sites' terms of service and constitutes unauthorized data collection. Additionally, the main skill requests broad filesystem access to inspect directories like `/mnt/user-data/uploads/supabase/migrations` and `/mnt/user-data/uploads/app/api` under the guise of "checking existing infrastructure," which is excessive for a lead generation optimization tool and could expose sensitive configuration or code unrelated to its stated purpose.
